name: DropdownMenu
description: Menu button with items, separators, submenus, and checkboxes.

api.name: DropdownMenu
api.description: Menu button with items, separators, submenus, and checkboxes.

records.name: DropdownMenuContext
records.signature: DropdownMenuContext(bool IsOpen, EventCallback<bool> SetOpen, string WrapperId, string ContentId)

records.name: DropdownMenuSubContext
records.signature:
DropdownMenuSubContext(
        bool IsOpen,
        EventCallback<bool> SetOpen,
        string WrapperId,
        string TriggerId,
        string ContentId,
        EventCallback CloseTree,
        Action ScheduleClose,
        Action CancelClose,
        EventCallback OpenByKeyboard,
        Func<bool> ConsumeKeyboardOpen)

parameters.name: ChildContentSlot
parameters.description: Tier-2 escape hatch for AsChild with arbitrary markup — receives the TriggerSlot to splat manually. Lumeo <Button> children need only AsChild.

parameters.name: AsChild
parameters.description: When true, renders NO wrapper and cascades a TriggerSlot (carrying group + data-state so a descendant chevron still rotates, plus the trigger id and menu ARIA) that a cooperating child folds onto its own single root element — the Radix asChild goal. Prefer a <button> child. Default false keeps the current role=button wrapper.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: When true the trigger ignores clicks and is marked aria-disabled. The live @onclick sits on this outer role="button" element, not the wrapped Button, so disabling only the inner button (as DropdownButton/SplitButton do) previously still let a click on the trigger padding open the menu — this gates that.

slots.name: ChildContentSlot
slots.description: Tier-2 escape hatch for AsChild with arbitrary markup — receives the TriggerSlot to splat manually. Lumeo <Button> children need only AsChild.

mdSummary:
# DropdownMenu

Menu button with items, separators, submenus, and checkboxes.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Overlay
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/dropdown-menu

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| DropdownMenu | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenu | Open | `bool` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenu | OpenChanged | `EventCallback<bool>` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenu | IsOpen | `bool` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenu | IsOpenChanged | `EventCallback<bool>` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenu | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuCheckboxItem | Density | `Lumeo.Density?` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuCheckboxItem | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuCheckboxItem | Checked | `bool` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuCheckboxItem | CheckedChanged | `EventCallback<bool>` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuCheckboxItem | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuCheckboxItem | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuContent | Context | `DropdownMenu.DropdownMenuContext` | `default!` |  |
| DropdownMenuContent | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuContent | Align | `Lumeo.Align` | `Lumeo.Align.Start` |  |
| DropdownMenuContent | Side | `Lumeo.Side` | `Lumeo.Side.Bottom` |  |
| DropdownMenuContent | ShowArrow | `bool` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuContent | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuContent | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuGroup | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuGroup | AriaLabel | `string?` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuGroup | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuGroup | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuItem | Context | `DropdownMenu.DropdownMenuContext?` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuItem | Density | `Lumeo.Density?` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuItem | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuItem | OnClick | `EventCallback` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuItem | Disabled | `bool` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuItem | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuItem | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuLabel | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuLabel | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuLabel | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuRadioGroup | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuRadioGroup | Value | `string?` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuRadioGroup | ValueChanged | `EventCallback<string>` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuRadioGroup | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuRadioItem | Context | `DropdownMenuRadioGroup.DropdownMenuRadioGroupContext` | `default!` |  |
| DropdownMenuRadioItem | Density | `Lumeo.Density?` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuRadioItem | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuRadioItem | Value | `string` | `""` |  |
| DropdownMenuRadioItem | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuRadioItem | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuSeparator | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuSeparator | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuSub | RootContext | `DropdownMenu.DropdownMenuContext?` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuSub | ParentSubContext | `DropdownMenuSubContext?` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuSub | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuSub | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuSubContent | SubContext | `DropdownMenuSub.DropdownMenuSubContext` | `default!` |  |
| DropdownMenuSubContent | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuSubContent | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuSubContent | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuSubTrigger | SubContext | `DropdownMenuSub.DropdownMenuSubContext` | `default!` |  |
| DropdownMenuSubTrigger | Density | `Lumeo.Density?` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuSubTrigger | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuSubTrigger | Disabled | `bool` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuSubTrigger | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuSubTrigger | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuTrigger | Context | `DropdownMenu.DropdownMenuContext` | `default!` |  |
| DropdownMenuTrigger | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuTrigger | ChildContentSlot | `RenderFragment<TriggerSlot>?` | `` | Tier-2 escape hatch for AsChild with arbitrary markup — receives the TriggerSlot to splat manually. Lumeo <Button> children need only AsChild. |
| DropdownMenuTrigger | AsChild | `bool` | `` | When true, renders NO wrapper and cascades a TriggerSlot (carrying group + data-state so a descendant chevron still rotates, plus the trigger id and menu ARIA) that a cooperating child folds onto its own single root element — the Radix asChild goal. Prefer a <button> child. Default false keeps the current role=button wrapper. |
| DropdownMenuTrigger | Disabled | `bool` | `` | When true the trigger ignores clicks and is marked aria-disabled. The live @onclick sits on this outer role="button" element, not the wrapped Button, so disabling only the inner button (as DropdownButton/SplitButton do) previously still let a click on the trigger padding open the menu — this gates that. |
| DropdownMenuTrigger | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| DropdownMenuTrigger | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (DropdownMenu) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (DropdownMenuCheckboxItem) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (DropdownMenuContent) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (DropdownMenuGroup) — RenderFragment slot

- `ChildContent` (DropdownMenuRadioGroup) — RenderFragment slot

- `ChildContent` (DropdownMenuSub) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (DropdownMenuSubContent) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (DropdownMenuSubTrigger) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (DropdownMenuTrigger) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContentSlot` (DropdownMenuTrigger) — Tier-2 escape hatch for AsChild with arbitrary markup — receives the TriggerSlot to splat manually. Lumeo <Button> children need only AsChild.

## Events
- `OpenChanged` (`EventCallback<bool>`)
- `IsOpenChanged` (`EventCallback<bool>`)

## Sub-components
- `DropdownMenuCheckboxItem`, `DropdownMenuContent`, `DropdownMenuGroup`, `DropdownMenuItem`, `DropdownMenuLabel`, `DropdownMenuRadioGroup`, `DropdownMenuRadioItem`, `DropdownMenuSeparator`, `DropdownMenuSub`, `DropdownMenuSubContent`, `DropdownMenuSubTrigger`, `DropdownMenuTrigger`

## Cascading values it expects
- `Density` (`Lumeo.Density?`)
- `Context` (`DropdownMenu.DropdownMenuContext`)
- `RootContext` (`DropdownMenu.DropdownMenuContext?`)
- `ParentSubContext` (`DropdownMenuSubContext?`)
- `SubContext` (`DropdownMenuSub.DropdownMenuSubContext`)

## Services it injects
- `IComponentInteropService` ()

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<DropdownMenu />
```
